overall.description: Static shot of a dimly lit gothic bedroom chamber from a survival horror game, featuring an ornate iron cage with glowing red interior, a four-poster bed with green curtains, and stone vaulted architecture. The atmospheric scene maintains a completely fixed camera perspective with no movement or action throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, unchanging perspective of a dimly lit gothic bedroom chamber. It begins with a fixed view of the room's stone vaulted architecture, where warm wall sconces cast a soft glow across the space. The gaze remains steady, centering on the contrast between an ornate iron cage with a glowing red interior on the left and a four-poster bed with green curtains on the right. As the scene persists, the atmosphere remains frozen in a state of eerie stillness with no movement or activity. The shot finally concludes while preserving this same haunting, motionless composition.
